headline: A Look At Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) Valuation After Recent Crypto And Voting Technology Moves
summary: Why Broadridge’s latest crypto and voting moves matter for BR shareholders Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) has been busy, linking Crypto.com into its NYFIX trading network, upgrading ProxyVote with Vanguard, and adding a new Chief Growth and Strategy Officer focused on technology driven expansion. See our latest analysis for Broadridge Financial Solutions. Recent moves in crypto connectivity, voting technology and leadership come after a mixed run in the stock, with a 30 day share price...

headline: Broadridge Financial Solutions Stock: Is BR Underperforming the Technology Sector?
